metric_label: how many tesla deliveries will there be this quarter
reason: Vehicle deliveries are the clean sold-volume driver for Tesla's dominant automotive sales revenue, with total revenue also including energy, services, leasing and other items.
Production is a supply/output measure, not the sold-volume revenue trigger. Tesla monetizes vehicles primarily when delivered, making deliveries the cleaner revenue KPI.

Netflix revenue is still overwhelmingly subscription/member based; paid subscribers/memberships, paired with ARM, are the clean dominant driver of total revenue, with advertising and other revenue still small.

est_share: N/A - net adds, not revenue base
reason: Subscriber gain is a period-change metric, not the monetized subscriber base. Total paid subscribers/memberships is the cleaner metric for mapping to revenue dollars.
